title: Wallpapers
description: Adds new colorful wallpapers that come in a variety of patterns to enhance the aesthetic appeal of your rooms!!
body:
![Wallpapers Logo](https://imgur.com/MNOAZHU.png) [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/zpKwRpZ.png)](https://discord.gg/t9csvzqSYb) [![Twitter/X](https://i.imgur.com/pGJbNvS.png)](https://X.com/I_AmMaker) [![Patreon](https://i.imgur.com/sA2zMrl.png)](https://www.patreon.com/makers_mods)
--- # **New Blocks:** - *Wallpaper Blocks (Obtained by using a Wallpaper Roll on planks)* # **New Items:** - *Wallpaper Rolls (All 16 colors + 16 more color if [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) is installed)* - *Skirting Boards (7 Types/Used for decorating the Wallpaper Blocks)* --- # **Compatibility:** - [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) ---
